attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- docs-updater: Docs Updater Agent
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>fan.summer</groupId>
    <artifactId>SwissKit</artifactId>
    <version>2.1.1</version>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <lombok.version>1.18.42</lombok.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- Import SwissKitJ-Api BOM for aligned dependency versions -->
    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
                <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
                <version>3.0.0</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>

        <!-- SwissKitJ-Api -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
            <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Excel -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.fesod</groupId>
            <artifactId>fesod-sheet</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Mybatis -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mybatis</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Email -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.simplejavamail</groupId>
            <artifactId>simple-java-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MigLayout (for legacy Swing components pending JavaFX migration) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.miglayout</groupId>
            <artifactId>miglayout-swing</artifactId>
            <version>11.3</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Force override vulnerable version transitively brought in by simple-java-mail -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.eclipse.angus</groupId>
            <artifactId>angus-mail</artifactId>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <profiles>
        <profile>
            <id>windows-exe</id>
            <activation>
                <os>
                    <family>windows</family>
                </os>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>com.akathist.maven.plugins.launch4j</groupId>
                        <artifactId>launch4j-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>2.7.0</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>l4j-clui</id>
                                <phase>package</phase>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>launch4j</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <headerType>gui</headerType>
                                    <outfile>target/SwissKit.exe</outfile>
                                    <jar>target/SwissKit-${project.version}.jar</jar>
                                    <icon>src/main/resources/icons/SwissKit.ico</icon>
                                    <errTitle>SwissKit Error</errTitle>
                                    <downloadUrl>https://adoptium.net/</downloadUrl>
                                    <supportUrl>https://github.com/MuskStark/SwissKitJ</supportUrl>
                                    <jre>
                                        <minVersion>17</minVersion>
                                        <jdkPreference>preferJre</jdkPreference>
                                        <runtimeBits>64/32</runtimeBits>
                                    </jre>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>

    <build>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <directory>src/main/resources</directory>

**新增文件（`fan.summer.plugin` 包）：**

- **`PluginLoader`** — 构造时接收 `Path pluginsDir`：
  - `start()` 扫描目录内所有 `*.jar`，用 `URLClassLoader` + `ServiceLoader<SwissKitJPlugin>` 加载插件，再启动 `WatchService` 守护线程监听文件变化（新增/删除/修改均支持热重载）
  - `stop()` 停止监听并调用 `onUnload()` 卸载所有插件
  - 每个 JAR 独立 `URLClassLoader`，支持干净卸载

- **`PluginRegistry`** — 持有 `ObservableList<SwissKitJPlugin>`：
  - `getPlugins()` 供 UI 绑定
  - `activate(plugin)` 自动先调用前一个插件的 `onDeactivate()`
  - `addPlugins` / `removePlugin` 由 `PluginLoader` 通过 `Platform.runLater` 在 FX 线程调用

**全量替换 `com.toolbox.*` → `fan.summer.*`：**

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `SwissKitJApp` | import → `fan.summer.plugin.*` + `fan.summer.api.MainWindow` |
| `MainWindow` | import → `fan.summer.plugin.*` + `fan.summer.api.*` |
| `ContentArea` / `DetailPanel` / `ToolCard` | `ToolPlugin` → `SwissKitJPlugin` |

content.text:
存在冲突，且是典型的 **Split Package（包分裂）** 问题：

```
fan.summer.api          ← SwissKitJ-Api 拥有
fan.summer.api          ← SwissKit 也有（冲突）
fan.summer.api.component ← SwissKitJ-Api 拥有
fan.summer.api.content  ← SwissKit 独有
fan.summer.api.sidebar  ← SwissKit 独有
fan.summer.api.titlebar ← SwissKit 独有
```

`fan.summer.api` 这个包被两个 JAR 同时持有。在 classpath 模式下会产生歧义，在 JPMS 模块化下直接报硬错误。

**修复方案**：`fan.summer.api.*` 命名空间归 SwissKitJ-Api 专属；SwissKit 中的主程序 UI 类统一移到 `fan.summer.ui.*`。

需要修改的文件：

| 原包 | 新包 |
|------|------|
| `fan.summer.api.MainWindow` | `fan.summer.ui.MainWindow` |
| `fan.summer.api.content.*` | `fan.summer.ui.content.*` |
| `fan.summer.api.sidebar.*` | `fan.summer.ui.sidebar.*` |
| `fan.summer.api.titlebar.*` | `fan.summer.ui.titlebar.*` |

content.text:
包名冲突已完全消除。

**修复前后对比：**

```
修复前（冲突）：
  SwissKitJ-Api  →  fan.summer.api          ⚠️ 同名
  SwissKitJ-Api  →  fan.summer.api.component ⚠️ 同名
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.api          ⚠️ 同名
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.api.content
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.api.sidebar
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.api.titlebar

修复后（无冲突）：
  SwissKitJ-Api  →  fan.summer.api           ✅ Api 专属
  SwissKitJ-Api  →  fan.summer.api.component ✅ Api 专属
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.ui            ✅ 主程序专属
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.ui.content
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.ui.sidebar
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.ui.titlebar
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.plugin
  SwissKit       →  fan.summer.buildintool.*
```

`fan.summer.api.*` 命名空间现在完全归 SwissKitJ-Api 所有，主程序 UI 层统一在 `fan.summer.ui.*` 下，两个模块包名不再有任何重叠。

1	package fan.summer.api;

3	import javafx.scene.Node;

5	/**
6	 * 所有工具（内置或插件）都实现此接口。
7	 * 主程序只依赖这个接口，与具体实现完全解耦。
8	 *
9	 * 插件开发者步骤：
10	 *   1. 在 pom.xml 中以 provided scope 依赖 SwissKitJ-Api：
11	 *      {@code
12	 *      <dependency>
13	 *          <groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
14	 *          <artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
15	 *          <version>3.0.0</version>
16	 *          <scope>provided</scope>
17	 *      </dependency>
18	 *      }
19	 *   2. 实现此接口
20	 *   3. 在 META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin 中声明实现类全限定名
21	 *   4. 将插件打包为 fat-JAR（包含所有私有依赖），放入主程序的 plugins/ 目录
22	 */
23	public interface SwissKitJPlugin {
24	
25	    // ── 元信息（用于侧边栏、搜索、详情面板） ────────────
26	
27	    /** 全局唯一 ID，建议用反向域名：com.example.my-tool */
28	    String getId();
29	
30	    /** 显示名称，如"JSON 格式化" */
31	    String getName();
32	
33	    /** 一句话描述，显示在卡片和详情面板 */
34	    String getDescription();
35	
36	    /** 分类，对应侧边栏导航：dev / text / image / net / other */
37	    String getCategory();
38	
39	    /** 版本号，如"1.0.0" */
40	    String getVersion();
41	
42	    /**
43	     * 图标字符（Emoji 或单字符），显示在卡片图标区。
44	     * 若需要自定义图标节点，可覆盖 getIconNode()。
45	     */
46	    String getIconText();
47	
48	    /**
49	     * 图标背景色 CSS 类，对应 glass.css 中的色彩变体：
50	     *   ic-blue / ic-purple / ic-teal / ic-amber / ic-red / ic-pink / ic-gray
51	     */
52	    default String getIconStyle() { return "ic-blue"; }
53	
54	    /**
55	     * 类型标识：内置工具返回 "builtin"，外部插件返回 "plugin"（默认）。
56	     * 用于卡片标签颜色和详情面板展示。
57	     */
58	    default String getType() { return "plugin"; }
59	
60	    // ── UI 生命周期 ──────────────────────────────────────
61	
62	    /**
63	     * 返回此工具的主界面节点。
64	     * 主程序将其嵌入内容区的 StackPane。
65	     * 首次调用时创建，之后可复用同一实例。
66	     */
67	    Node createView();
68	
69	    /**
70	     * 工具被切换到前台时调用（可在此恢复状态、启动定时器等）。
71	     * 默认空实现，按需覆盖。
72	     */
73	    default void onActivate() {}
74	
75	    /**
76	     * 工具被切换到后台时调用（应暂停定时器、保存临时状态等）。
77	     * 默认空实现，按需覆盖。
78	     */
79	    default void onDeactivate() {}
80	
81	    /**
82	     * 插件被卸载前调用（应释放所有资源：线程、文件句柄等）。
83	     * 默认空实现，按需覆盖。
84	     */
85	    default void onUnload() {}
86	}

- Implement PluginLoader (JAR scan + hot-reload via WatchService) and PluginRegistry
- Resolve split-package conflict: move host UI classes from fan.summer.api.* to fan.summer.ui.*

- Fix SwissKitJ-Api pom: remove circular parent reference, pin javafx.version, add javafx-controls
- Fix PluginLoader import (was incorrectly referencing log4j PluginRegistry)
- Fix SwissKitJPlugin Javadoc SPI path (was referencing stale com.toolbox class name)
- Standardize all string literals and comments to English across both modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

aiTitle: Migrate builtin tools to fan.summer.buildintool package

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

The user undertook a series of progressive refactoring tasks on the `SwissKitJ` Java/JavaFX project (branch `v3.0.0-JavaFX`) — a desktop tool suite with a plugin architecture consisting of two Maven modules: `SwissKitJ-Api` (the public plugin API) and `SwissKit` (the main application).

Explicit requests in order:
1. Extract all built-in tool implementations from `BuiltinToolRegistrar` into separate classes under `fan.summer.buildintool`, organized by category (`dev`, `image`, `text`). `BuiltinToolRegistrar` should only handle registration. Use `SwissKitJPlugin` (not old `ToolPlugin`).
2. Implement `PluginLoader` — JAR scanning and hot-reload for external plugins.
3. Check the `SwissKitJ-Api` module and main project to ensure they are properly structured for third-party plugin development (ignoring `OfficalPlugin/` as legacy).
4. Analyze what in the main project can be migrated to `SwissKitJ-Api` and perform the migration.
5. Check whether the two modules have package name conflicts and fix them.
6. Replace ALL Chinese text (code strings, comments, Javadoc) with English across all source files. Commit the changes, but do NOT mention the Chinese→English change in the commit message.

---

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- Java 21, JavaFX 21.0.2, Maven multi-module project
- Plugin architecture using `java.util.ServiceLoader` (`META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin`)
- Split-package problem (two JARs owning the same Java package) and its resolution
- `URLClassLoader` per JAR for isolated class loading and clean unloading
- `WatchService` for filesystem hot-reload of plugin JARs
- `ObservableList<SwissKitJPlugin>` bound to the UI for reactive plugin list updates
- `provided` scope Maven dependency for API artifacts consumed by plugins
- BOM (Bill of Materials) vs plain JAR dependency in Maven
- JavaFX lifecycle: `Platform.runLater` for UI thread safety from background threads
- Conventional commits with emoji prefix (`♻️ refactor:`)

---

3. Files and Code Sections:

**`SwissKitJ-Api/src/main/java/fan/summer/api/SwissKitJPlugin.java`**
- The core plugin interface. Was entirely in Chinese Javadoc with wrong SPI path in comments (`com.toolbox.api.ToolPlugin`).
- Fixed: Javadoc fully rewritten in English, SPI path corrected to `fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin`, Maven dependency snippet added.
```java
public interface SwissKitJPlugin {
    String getId();
    String getName();
    String getDescription();
    String getCategory();    // dev / text / image / net / other
    String getVersion();
    String getIconText();
    default String getIconStyle() { return "ic-blue"; }
    default String getType() { return "plugin"; }
    Node createView();
    default void onActivate() {}
    default void onDeactivate() {}
    default void onUnload() {}
}
```

**`SwissKitJ-Api/src/main/java/fan/summer/api/component/StepWizard.java`**
- Migrated from `SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/api/component/StepWizard.java` to SwissKitJ-Api so third-party plugin developers can reuse it.
- Chinese comments translated: `// ── 状态` → `// ── State`, `// ── 固定子节点` → `// ── Fixed child nodes`, `// ── 颜色常量` → `// ── Colour constants`, `// 显示第一 steps` → `// Show the first step`, `// 连接线` → `// Connector line`; Javadoc example strings translated.

**`SwissKitJ-Api/pom.xml`**
- Was broken: circular parent reference (pointed to itself), `${javafx.version}` undefined.
- Fixed to standalone POM with explicit version properties:
```xml
<groupId>fan.summer.api</groupId>
<artifactId>SwissKitJ-Api</artifactId>
<version>3.0.0</version>
<properties>
  <javafx.version>21.0.2</javafx.version>
</properties>
<dependencies>
  <dependency>javafx-graphics, provided</dependency>
  <dependency>javafx-controls, provided</dependency>  <!-- added for StepWizard -->
</dependencies>
```

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/plugin/PluginLoader.java`** (newly created)
- Scans `plugins/` directory for `*.jar` files, loads via `URLClassLoader` + `ServiceLoader<SwissKitJPlugin>`, starts a daemon `WatchService` thread for hot-reload (ENTRY_CREATE/DELETE/MODIFY). 500ms delay on create/modify to allow file to finish writing.
- Key signature: `public PluginLoader(Path pluginsDir)`, `public void start()`, `public void stop()`, package-private `void setRegistry(PluginRegistry registry)`.
- **Critical bug fixed**: Linter auto-imported `org.apache.logging.log4j.core.config.plugins.util.PluginRegistry` (log4j internal class) instead of `fan.summer.plugin.PluginRegistry`. Fixed manually twice (once in PluginLoader, once in BuiltinToolRegistrar).

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/plugin/PluginRegistry.java`** (newly created)
- Holds `ObservableList<SwissKitJPlugin>` (FXCollections), manages activation lifecycle.
- Key methods: `getPlugins()`, `activate(SwissKitJPlugin)`, package-private `addPlugins(List)`, `removePlugin(SwissKitJPlugin)`.
- Constructor wires itself into `PluginLoader`: `loader.setRegistry(this)`.

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/Registrar/BuiltinToolRegistrar.java`**
- Rewritten to only contain registration:
```java
public static void register(PluginLoader loader, PluginRegistry registry) {
    registry.getPlugins().addAll(
        new JsonFormatterPlugin(),
        new Base64Plugin(),
        new HashCalculatorPlugin(),
        new ExcelSplitterPlugin(),
        new ColorConverterPlugin(),
        new MarkdownEditorPlugin()
    );
}
```

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/buildintool/excelsplitter/ExcelSplitterPlugin.java`**
- Changed `implements ToolPlugin` → `implements SwissKitJPlugin`.
- Added missing import `fan.summer.api.component.StepWizard`.
- All Chinese translated: `"Split方式"` → `"Split mode"`, `"未Select file"` → `"No file selected"`, `"输出File name prefix（可选）"` → `"Output file name prefix (optional)"`, `"按列/行Split时Keep header"` → `"Keep header row when splitting by column or row count"`, `"Step 4: Execute split + 结果展示"` → `"Step 4: Execute split and show results"`, all comments translated.

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/ui/MainWindow.java`** (moved from `fan.summer.api.MainWindow`)
**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/ui/content/ContentArea.java`** (moved from `fan.summer.api.content`)

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/ui/titlebar/TitleBar.java`** (moved from `fan.summer.api.titlebar`)
- All moved to resolve split-package conflict. Package declarations updated.
- Sidebar: `"收藏"` → `"FAVORITES"`, `"设置"` → `"Settings"`, `"默认激活"All Tools""` → `"Activate "All Tools" by default"`.
- TitleBar: `"通知"` → `"Notifications"`, `"设置"` → `"Settings"`.
- All `com.toolbox.api.ToolPlugin` references → `fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin`.

**`SwissKit/src/main/java/fan/summer/app/SwissKitJApp.java`**
- Updated: `import fan.summer.api.MainWindow` → `import fan.summer.ui.MainWindow`, `com.toolbox.plugin.*` → `fan.summer.plugin.*`.

**`SwissKit/pom.xml`**
- Removed BOM import (SwissKitJ-Api has no `dependencyManagement`; BOM import was a no-op and caused missing version error).
- Added explicit `<version>3.0.0</version>` to SwissKitJ-Api dependency.

---

- **Wrong `PluginRegistry` import (log4j)**: The linter auto-replaced the `PluginRegistry` import in both `PluginLoader.java` and `BuiltinToolRegistrar.java` with `org.apache.logging.log4j.core.config.plugins.util.PluginRegistry`. Fixed by manually setting the correct import `fan.summer.plugin.PluginRegistry` in both files. This happened twice (once for each file).

- **`SwissKitJPlugin.java` wrong SPI path in Javadoc**: Referenced `com.toolbox.api.ToolPlugin` (old class name). Third-party developers following this would create wrong service files and their plugins would never load. Fixed by updating Javadoc to show `META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin`.

- **`SwissKitJ-Api/pom.xml` circular parent reference**: Parent was set to itself (`fan.summer.api/SwissKitJ-Api/3.0.0`). `${javafx.version}` was undefined. Fixed by removing parent, making standalone POM, hardcoding `javafx.version=21.0.2`.

```bash
java -jar SwissKit/target/SwissKit-2.1.1.jar
```

To build and run only the main app module:
```bash
mvn clean package -pl SwissKit -am -DskipTests
```

On Windows, the `windows-exe` Maven profile is auto-activated and produces `SwissKit.exe` via Launch4j. GitHub Actions handles multi-platform builds — local Maven is not required for releases.

## Module Structure

| Module | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `SwissKitJ-Api` | Shared plugin interface (`SwissKitJPlugin`), consumed by core and all plugins |
| `SwissKit` | Main JavaFX application — UI shell, plugin loading, built-in tools |
| `OfficalPlugin/SwissKitJ-Plugin-HappyLearning` | Auto-learning plugin |
| `OfficalPlugin/SwissKitJ-Plugin-Qcc` | CSV-to-Excel converter plugin |
| `OfficalPlugin/SwissKit-Plugin-Mouse` | Mouse automation plugin |

All plugins declare `SwissKitJ-Api` as `provided` scope. The main app provides it at runtime via the fat JAR.

## Architecture

**Entry point**: `fan.summer.Launcher` (fat-JAR manifest) → `fan.summer.app.SwissKitJApp` (JavaFX `Application`).

**Startup sequence** (in `SwissKitJApp.start()`):
1. Resolve `plugins/` directory (JAR sibling in production, `./plugins/` in dev)
2. Create `PluginLoader` + `PluginRegistry`
3. Register built-in tools via `BuiltinToolRegistrar` (bypasses JAR loading, directly adds to registry)
4. Build `MainWindow` and display it
5. Start `PluginLoader` (scans `plugins/` dir and watches for changes)

**UI structure** (all in `fan.summer.api.*`):
- `MainWindow` — root `BorderPane`; owns `Sidebar`, `ContentArea`, `DetailPanel`, `TitleBar`
- `Sidebar` — category-based navigation
- `ContentArea` — shows `ToolCard` grid or the active tool's `Node`
- `DetailPanel` — slide-in panel showing plugin metadata
- `TitleBar` — custom window chrome (window is `StageStyle.TRANSPARENT`)

**Theming**: Single CSS file at `src/main/resources/css/glass.css` (glassmorphism). Plugin icon background colors are CSS classes: `ic-blue / ic-purple / ic-teal / ic-amber / ic-red / ic-pink / ic-gray`.

**Database**: H2 file at `.swisskit/swisskit.db` relative to the runtime working directory. Schema initialized from `init.sql`. Accessed via MyBatis; mapper XMLs are in `src/main/resources/mapper/`.

**i18n**: `src/main/resources/i18n/messages.properties` (Chinese default), `messages_en.properties` (English).

## Branch Status — v3.0.0-JavaFX

This branch is an active migration from Swing/FlatLaf to JavaFX. Legacy Swing classes live in `SwissKit/backup/` and are **excluded from Maven compilation** via `<excludes>` in `SwissKit/pom.xml`. Do not move files out of `backup/` unless completing their JavaFX port.

The plugin interface was also renamed: the old `fan.summer.api.KitPage` (Swing `JPanel`-based) is replaced by `fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin` (JavaFX `Node`-based).

## Plugin Development

**Interface**: `fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin` (in `SwissKitJ-Api`)

```java
public interface SwissKitJPlugin {
    String getId();          // reverse-domain ID, e.g. "com.example.my-tool"
    String getName();
    String getDescription();
    String getCategory();    // dev / text / image / net / other
    String getVersion();
    String getIconText();    // emoji or single char
    default String getIconStyle() { return "ic-blue"; }  // CSS class for icon bg
    default String getType()      { return "plugin"; }   // "builtin" for built-ins

    Node createView();       // called once; result cached and reused
    default void onActivate()   {}
    default void onDeactivate() {}
    default void onUnload()     {}
}
```

**External plugins** (JAR-based):
1. Implement `SwissKitJPlugin`
2. Declare in `META-INF/services/fan.summer.api.SwissKitJPlugin`
3. Drop JAR into `plugins/` directory; hot-reload is supported

**Built-in tools** skip SPI entirely — `BuiltinToolRegistrar.register()` adds them directly to `PluginRegistry`. See existing tools there as templates.
